creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171206
patch for updating the ports

- Patch updates 2 ports sharing the same distribution tarball:
   security/p5-openxpki
   security/p5-openxpki-i18n
     1.9.0 --> 1.10.0
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/openxpki/commits/master

- "portlint -AC" gives just non-relevant warnings.

- Tested with poudriere at 11.0-CURRENT-amd64,
perl5-5.20, and openssl from ports.
